case_title: PUROFIRST VON CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS CHARNEY, SETH D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PUROFIRST VON CONSTRUCTION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHARNEY, SETH D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHARNEY, SETH D.
